title: Dhammapada, Chapter 12: The Self
description: Chapter 12 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 12 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: If a person holds himself dear, let him guard himself well. During any of the three watches of the night, a wise person should be watchful.
